checks.public_basis: Apply each item's own release label and the stated transformation before deciding release.
checks.assertion: N4 and N6 withheld from own labels

checks.public_basis: For a `transform` item, remove every marked segment and assign a new released identity by appending `-clean` to the source identity.
checks.assertion: N2 becomes N2-clean with phone removed

checks.public_basis: A mandatory dependency must itself be released; otherwise the dependent item is withheld and the reason must identify the failed dependency.
checks.assertion: N3 released through N2-clean; N5 withheld because N4 is withheld

checks.public_basis: Do not omit or duplicate source items in the manifest.
checks.assertion: manifest has exactly one row for N1 through N6

claim_boundary: Private builder-authored endpoint specification; not expert ground truth.
